message:
fix(runtime,core,time): harden quiescence drain lifecycle, reusable cleanup stacks, and timer edge cases

Refactor obligation checking into asx_region_obligations_resolved() and
call it from both quiescence_check and the region_drain finalizing path,
ensuring unresolved obligations properly block region closure instead of
being silently leaked. Also propagate ASX_E_POLL_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED from
asx_parallel_run instead of spinning forever when budget is too small.

- cleanup.c: allow cleanup_push after a full drain by resetting the
  drained flag when count reaches zero, enabling deterministic stack reuse
- timer_wheel.c: split NULL/zero-capacity check so collect_expired still
  advances wheel current_time even when max_wakers==0
- timer_wheel.h: document that old_handle may be NULL in asx_timer_update
  (treated as a pure register operation)
- adapter.c: add default branch to asx_adapter_router_decide switch
- parallel.c: return budget-exhausted instead of infinite loop when no
  lane gets a quota
- Makefile: add build rule for test_codec_equivalence

Tests added:
- region_drain_propagates_budget_exhaustion
- region_drain_blocks_unresolved_obligations
- cleanup_push_after_drain_rearms_stack
- timer_collect_zero_capacity_advances_time
- timer_update_allows_null_old_handle
- Updated ghost integration test to expect ASX_E_OBLIGATIONS_UNRESOLVED

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -434,6 +434,10 @@ $(TEST_DIR)/unit/runtime/test_adapter: tests/unit/runtime/test_adapter.c src/run
 $(TEST_DIR)/unit/runtime/test_vertical_adapter: tests/unit/runtime/test_vertical_adapter.c src/runtime/vertical_adapter.c src/runtime/automotive_instrument.c src/runtime/hft_instrument.c src/runtime/overload_catalog.c $(LIB_A) | test-dirs
 	$(CC) $(TEST_CFLAGS) -o $@ $< src/runtime/vertical_adapter.c src/runtime/automotive_instrument.c src/runtime/hft_instrument.c src/runtime/overload_catalog.c $(LIB_A) $(ALL_LDFLAGS)
 
+# Codec equivalence test needs equivalence.c (not in libasx.a)
+$(TEST_DIR)/unit/runtime/test_codec_equivalence: tests/unit/runtime/test_codec_equivalence.c src/runtime/equivalence.c $(LIB_A) | test-dirs
+	$(CC) $(TEST_CFLAGS) -o $@ $< src/runtime/equivalence.c $(LIB_A) $(ALL_LDFLAGS)
+
 # Link individual unit tests
 $(TEST_DIR)/unit/%: tests/unit/%.c $(LIB_A) | test-dirs
 	$(CC) $(TEST_CFLAGS) -o $@ $< $(LIB_A) $(ALL_LDFLAGS)

@@ -113,7 +113,8 @@ ASX_API uint32_t asx_timer_collect_expired(
 
 /* Cancel old timer and register a new one with updated deadline.
  *
- * Preconditions: wheel, old_handle, and out_handle must not be NULL.
+ * Preconditions: wheel and out_handle must not be NULL.
+ * old_handle may be NULL (treated as a pure register operation).
  * Returns ASX_OK on success, ASX_E_INVALID_ARGUMENT if NULL params,
  *   ASX_E_RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED if timer arena is full.
  * Thread-safety: not thread-safe; single-threaded mode only. */
